title: day-vault-factory-policy.v1
description: DAY-386 vault factory policy: permissionless creator rules on top of DAY strategies. Fail-closed: no custody, owner exit always, DAY 5% skim disclosed, depositableLive false without write gates. Principal never charged.

name.description: Optional human label for the vault policy

strategyMode.description: allowlist = explicit strategyIds only; any_day_strategy = any registered DAY strategy

strategyAllowlist.description: DAY strategyIds this vault may allocate into. Non-empty required when strategyMode=allowlist; may be empty when any_day_strategy

chainScope.description: within_chain only until multi-chain bridge rails + safety proven for factory vaults

assetAllowlist.description: Deposit assets allowed (e.g. USDC). Empty = unset (factory may default)

ownerExitAlways.description: Constitution: owner can always EXIT principal

custody.description: No team / server intermediate custody of principal

depositableLive.description: Scaffold fail-closed: never true without write path + WRITE_GO gates (later tickets)

autoHarvest.description: Permissionless harvest arm — OFF by default

autoCompound.description: Compound residual after skim — OFF by default

autoPayEnabled.description: Auto Pay residual hooks — OFF by default; owner-gated

micros.description: Non-negative integer micros as decimal string (BigInt-safe)

minApyImprovementBps.description: Only switch strategy if net APY improves by at least this many bps

daySkimBps.description: DAY yield performance skim on harvested yield only (5%)

creatorFeeBps.description: Optional Strategy Lead performance fee on realized profit; principal never charged; max 2500 bps (25% FeeConfig cap)
